auth.note: Session cookie must be present and valid. Account in session must match account_id param or be an authorized system caller.

contract.title: Get Account Entitlements
contract.governs: Read-only access to a taxpayer account's entitlements record from R2 canonical path tmp_entitlements/{account_id}.json. Falls back to plan defaults from wrangler.toml vars (TMP_PLAN_*) when no R2 record exists.

shape.taxToolTokens: integer — current tax tool token balance
shape.tokensGrantedAt: string | null — ISO timestamp of last token grant
shape.billingPeriodEnd: string | null — ISO timestamp of billing period end
shape.updatedAt: string — ISO timestamp of last update

error.403: Forbidden — session account_id does not match path param
error.404: Not found — account does not exist
